target:
Ah… my head's splitting apart…
Hilko's presence…!

So that's it!!
Shinpei can sense the shadow's presence now too.
Mother has been sending signals to control shadows this whole time…

When I was being controlled by my sister… 
The voice of Mother that felt so comfortable became a really unpleasant sound.

Since I'm a shadow,
I can erase the discomfort from my senses, 
but there's nothing Shinpei here can do about it.
It's fine. Focus on my presence!

My sister is countering Mother's signal.
…Why can she do that!?

Punch!
No matter how many times, I'll beat you up!!
I'll shatter the wall with me!!

…That's a good strategy.
But before that… listen…

Ryunosuke can see two seconds ahead. 
Follow my line of sight.

…Unfurling hair at super speed to create a barrier!!
It's reach has increased dramatically compared to before!!

Shideeeeee!!!
Today, we'll settle this once and for all!!
My attacks aren't hitting at all!?

(Heine!!
You're coming out from the shrine!!)

(…As long as I'm being watched by him,
Ryunosuke's two-second foresight won't be a decisive blow…)
(If I foresee and tell, it'll just get blocked by the observer!!)

(Ushio's blade is terrifying. I should have known from the battle at sea.
Even Shide would get a fatal wound if it hit!!)
(That's why both Heine and Shide have no choice but to focus on our movements!!)

(In that case, I'll subtly and naturally…
without being noticed…)
There's a killing intent spilling out, Mio.
I've already sensed all the shadows' positions.

There's another one hiding behind the rock!
The shadow of a nail gun gives it away completely!

It worked!! 
I've woven the shadow around Heine!

(The presence of shadows that Heine sensed…
It was a fake nail gun printed by Ushio!)

(Sou had the real, non-shadow nail gun!
Heine didn't notice its presence at all!!)

(Up to this point, everything's gone according to plan!
Now just…)
Now you can't tell us what we'll do two seconds from now!

I told ya…
You think I'm gonna keep being careless forever?

…How dare a human…!!
This is fun!!
Heine… you want to go back, don't ya?

If you return home,
time won't flow for you.
You'll be able to survive without dying…

In an eternal world, with your family,
with the person you love most… forever.
It'd be great if you could live like that…

…But sorry.
We can't understand each other…

It's disappearing…
The mud… the armor that Heine gave me…
If Mother dies… the shadows will disappear…

Why… Shinpei…
Even though I've defeated the villain,
this is supposed to be over…

It's not disappearing… neither am I, nor my sister…
Mother is still alive!!!
(My right eye and Ushio's right eye are both emitting this presence…)

Why are they still moving!
Both Shide and the sister were definitely killed!!

Haha! 
I really thought I was done for, Shinpei-kun!

Heine… no, Hilko.
You're just trash now…

Even with such a small body…
Recovery is hopeless…

Eyes are damaged too.
Even if I eat everyone on this island,
there's no way to regain my power…

But really, 
I was genuinely disappointed just now.
However… what about that right eye!!

That's the observer's right eye!!
You really are "the egg"…!!!
It just awakened!!

That's the Observer's right eye!!
It's you… "Egg"…  
It has just awoken!!!

I thought you were growing more…
That's why I was able to restore you, isn't it?

Hahahaha! Haha!
Is this the power of love?!!
If I take those eyes from you, my wish will still come true!!!

I'm still…able to do it!
If I eat someone, 
It'll make me feel better…!!!

What's that…?!
Heine is your mother, right?

So what?
I have no interest in the past.

You!!
Even so, are you human?!
But I still need Hiruko to live…

If Hiriko dies, my armor will disappear,
And the eyes of Ushio-chan that just awakened too… 
Will vanish.
I'll take you back to your hometown as wished…

Like this…body…
If I go back---

(Ryunosuke-san, please fly with all your strength!!!
I don't care what happens to my body!!!! 
I can't let him get away!!!)

What is this?! 
It's being sucked into the hole!!!

No Shinpei!!  
You're getting pulled in!!!

Once you enter…
You won't be able to come back…or even die. You'll just get lost!!!
From here, I'm the only one going!!

Idiot!! 
I'll never let you go alone!!!

What?!
You're not listening?!?
This stubbornness!!

Ryunosuke!! Can you hear me?? 
Move Shinpei's body and run away!!!

It's too late…
Shide won't let us escape.

If we abandon them here… 
I'll get scolded by my sister in the afterlife.

I've decided.
My sister's promise to save everyone…
I'll fulfill it instead!!!

Shinpei, I'll support you!
I won't let him get lost at all!!

I'll follow your presence.
I've always been by Ushio's side…

I love Ushio. 
I want to be with someone I like,  
What's wrong with that?
